channel.title: The Climate Digest
channel.description: Your weekly AI-generated briefing on sustainability, climate finance, carbon accounting, and non-financial reporting.
channel.itunes:author: ESG Digest

item.title: The Climate Digest — Week 15, 2026
item.description: This week’s digest covers the SBTi’s draft Power Sector Net-Zero Standard pilot, new chemicals sector pathways, U.S. EPA’s regulatory reversal, and Africa’s carbon market expansion potential. We also highlight EU adaptation tools, biochar plant tenders, and super pollutant project scaling.
item.itunes:summary: This week’s digest covers the SBTi’s draft Power Sector Net-Zero Standard pilot, new chemicals sector pathways, U.S. EPA’s regulatory reversal, and Africa’s carbon market expansion potential. We also highlight EU adaptation tools, biochar plant tenders, and super pollutant project scaling.

item.title: The Climate Digest — Week 14, 2026
item.description: This week’s digest covers India’s revised 2035 climate commitment, SBTi’s updated FLAG guidance and new governance steps, emerging risks in voluntary carbon markets, and fresh data on urban heat risks and European adaptation needs. Key regulatory and market signals from the WCI, Washington state, and EU early warning systems are also highlighted.
item.itunes:summary: This week’s digest covers India’s revised 2035 climate commitment, SBTi’s updated FLAG guidance and new governance steps, emerging risks in voluntary carbon markets, and fresh data on urban heat risks and European adaptation needs. Key regulatory and market signals from the WCI, Washington state, and EU early warning systems are also highlighted.
